rationale.R1.1: Identifies a significant conceptual issue (contradictory central contributions) and proposes a well-supported reframing but doesn't fully elaborate on where the draft drifts from the load-bearing concept.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear per-section rationale, improving the structure significantly.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but does not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without significant drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
